title: Soumitra Dutta Oxford: Can Monday.com connect to API?
excerpt:

posts.author: soumitradutta26 (Soumitra Dutta)
posts.cookedHtml:
My name is Soumitra Dutta, I’m exploring ways to connect Monday.com to an external API and wanted to see if anyone here has experience with this.

Do you have any suggestions, tips, or best practices for integrating Monday.com with APIs? Any tools, workflows, or methods you’ve found helpful would be greatly appreciated!

Regards

Soumitra Dutta

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Soumitra Dutta:

My name is Soumitra Dutta, I’m exploring ways to connect Monday.com to an external API and wanted to see if anyone here has experience with this.

Do you have any suggestions, tips, or best practices for integrating Monday.com with APIs? Any tools, workflows, or methods you’ve found helpful would be greatly appreciated!

Hi @soumitradutta26

Hi Soumitra,

There are a few solid ways to integrate monday.com with external APIs depending on your use case.

For example, we’ve used the monday API to push data from monday.com into Power BI to build reports and dashboards.

If you’re just getting started, you can check out the monday API documentation for the basics. I’d also recommend the monday Academy courses they’re helpful for learning how to query and manipulate data using the API.

monday.com Platform API
The basics
monday academy | Skills, Training, Courses, Webinars & Certifications

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yep, you can definitely connect monday.com to external APIs

monday has a GraphQL API that lets you both pull data out and push data in, so you can sync items, update fields, or trigger workflows from external systems.

A few common approaches:

  • Direct API integration for full control

  • Middleware like Make or Zapier if you want a faster setup

  • Webhooks + API for event-driven workflows

Best practices:

  • use a unique ID to match records across systems

  • watch rate limits for larger syncs

  • start small and scale once it’s stable

API Quickstart Tutorial - PHP – Support

Does monday.com have an API? – Support

API Rate Limits – Support

monday.com Platform API

Introduction to GraphQL API | monday academy

Building monday Apps | monday academy

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @soumitradutta26 ,

Connecting monday with external APIs is definitely possible and quite flexible.

A simple way to connect monday with an external API is by using no-code tools like Make or Zapier, as well as other platforms such as Microsoft Power Automate or n8n. These tools make it easy to send and receive data between systems without much coding effort.

If you’re comfortable with a bit of development, you can also use it’s GraphQL API to directly interact with boards and items. Another useful approach is setting up webhooks, which allow you to trigger actions in real-time whenever something changes in monday.

The official API docs are also good places to get familiar with how everything works.

Hope this helps!
